Rule: Derived naturally inside Pillar A; only later A-internal phases in DAG order may consume it.
Consumable by Pillar A only if explicitly listed in input handoff B_to_A, C_to_A, D_to_A, or E_to_A.
Output to other pillars. Generated by A and exportable to B/C/D/E; forbidden to Pillar A itself.
CD remains a consumer/bridge, not another generator.
Pillar A may never use its own output handoff as a source; backreaction only via input handoffs.
Registered as a side target. It may consume CNNA outputs for comparison, but it may not supply axioms, source objects, or hidden assumptions to Pillar A or to any core derivation.
